sentences.target: J'aime le motif de cette chemise.

translations.fr: J'aime le motif de cette chemise.
translations.en: I like the pattern of this shirt.
translations.es: Me gusta el estampado de esta camisa.
translations.de: Ich mag das Muster dieses Hemds.
translations.it: Mi piace la fantasia di questa camicia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢这件衬衫的图案。
translations.yue: 我鍾意呢件恤衫嘅圖案。
translations.he: אני אוהב את ההדפס של החולצה הזאת.
translations.vi: Tôi thích họa tiết của chiếc áo sơ mi này.
translations.nl: Ik vind het patroon van dit overhemd mooi.
translations.hu: Tetszik ennek az ingnek a mintája.
translations.hi: मुझे इस कमीज़ का पैटर्न पसंद है।
translations.pl: Podoba mi się wzór tej koszuli.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει το μοτίβο αυτού του πουκαμίσου.
translations.nb: Jeg liker mønsteret på denne skjorten.
translations.sv: Jag gillar mönstret på den här skjortan.
translations.cs: Líbí se mi vzor této košile.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide mønstret på denne skjorte.
translations.ja: このシャツの柄が好きです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun je elided to j' and attached to aime (present indicative, 1st person singular of aimer); main finite verb of the clause.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun motif.
Common noun, masculine; here denotes a design/pattern; head of the NP 'le motif'.
Preposition introducing a complement of noun (possessive/association) 'de cette chemise'.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; agrees with the noun chemise.
Common noun, feminine; complement of the preposition de.

sentences.target: Regarde le motif sur ce tapis.

translations.fr: Regarde le motif sur ce tapis.
translations.en: Look at the pattern on this rug.
translations.es: Mira el motivo de esta alfombra.
translations.de: Schau dir das Muster auf diesem Teppich an.
translations.it: Guarda il motivo su questo tappeto.
translations.zh-Hans: 看看这块地毯上的图案。
translations.yue: 睇下呢張地毯上面嘅圖案。
translations.ru: Посмотри на узор на этом ковре.
translations.he: תסתכל על הדוגמה שעל השטיח הזה.
translations.vi: Nhìn họa tiết trên tấm thảm này.
translations.ar: انظر إلى النقشة على هذه السجادة.
translations.nl: Kijk naar het patroon op dit tapijt.
translations.uk: Подивись на візерунок на цьому килимі.
translations.hu: Nézd meg ennek a szőnyegnek a mintáját.
translations.hi: इस कालीन के पैटर्न को देखो।
translations.pl: Popatrz na wzór na tym dywanie.
translations.el: Κοίτα το μοτίβο σε αυτό το χαλί.
translations.nb: Se på mønsteret på dette teppet.
translations.sv: Titta på mönstret på den här mattan.
translations.ro: Uită-te la modelul de pe acest covor.
translations.cs: Podívej se na vzor na tomto koberci.
translations.da: Kig på mønsteret på dette tæppe.

tokens.explanation: Imperative, 2nd person singular of regarder; directive main verb meaning 'look'.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces motif.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of Regarde, denoting a design/pattern.
Preposition expressing location; heads the prepositional phrase 'sur ce tapis'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies tapis.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition sur.

sentences.target: On demande le motif de l'absence.

translations.fr: On demande le motif de l'absence.
translations.en: They ask for the reason for the absence.
translations.es: Piden el motivo de la ausencia.
translations.de: Man fragt nach dem Grund für die Abwesenheit.
translations.pt: Eles pedem o motivo da ausência.
translations.vi: Họ yêu cầu lý do vắng mặt.
translations.nl: Ze vragen naar de reden van de afwezigheid.
translations.hi: वे अनुपस्थिति का कारण पूछते हैं।
translations.nb: De ber om årsaken til fraværet.
translations.sv: De frågar efter orsaken till frånvaron.
translations.da: De spørger om årsagen til fraværet.
translations.ja: 欠席の理由を尋ねます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/personal subject pronoun; generic 'one' (often colloquial 'we').
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of demander; main finite verb.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces motif.
Common noun, masculine; here means 'reason/grounds'; direct object of demande.
Preposition introducing a complement of the noun motif.
Noun with elided definite article l' (le before vowel); complement of de.

sentences.target: Je préfère un motif plus discret.

translations.fr: Je préfère un motif plus discret.
translations.en: I prefer a more subtle pattern.
translations.zh-Hans: 我更喜欢低调一些的图案。
translations.yue: 我比較鍾意低調啲嘅圖案。
translations.tr: Daha sade bir deseni tercih ederim.
translations.vi: Tôi thích họa tiết tinh tế hơn.
translations.nl: Ik geef de voorkeur aan een subtieler patroon.
translations.uk: Я надаю перевагу більш стриманому візерунку.
translations.hi: मुझे ज़्यादा सादा पैटर्न पसंद है।
translations.nb: Jeg foretrekker et mer diskret mønster.
translations.id: Saya lebih suka motif yang lebih sederhana.
translations.sv: Jag föredrar ett mer diskret mönster.
translations.da: Jeg foretrekker et mere diskret mønster.
translations.ja: もっと控えめな柄が好きです。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of préférer; main finite verb.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces motif.
Common noun, masculine; head of the NP 'un motif'.
Comparative adverb modifying the adjective discret.
Adjective, masculine singular; complements motif and is modified by plus.

Look at the pattern on this rug.
They ask for the reason for the absence.
I prefer a more subtle pattern.
